meta.title: MAAS + MATA · RBC Capital Markets
meta.description: One institutional trading ecosystem: MAAS executes across asset classes; MATA explains every outcome with greater consistency, visibility and control.

hero.subtitle: One institutional trading ecosystem: MAAS executes across asset classes; MATA explains every outcome with greater consistency, visibility and control.

cards.title: Multi-Asset Agency Solutions
cards.body: MAAS brings multi asset trading into one connected execution platform, helping institutional trading desks streamline workflows, improve consistency, and execute with greater confidence.

cards.title: Multi-Asset Trade Analytics
cards.body: MATA delivers cross asset trade analytics that provide deeper execution insights, portfolio wide visibility, and the intelligence needed to optimize future trading decisions.

closeTheLoop.heading: Built to close the loop between trade and insight
closeTheLoop.body: MAAS and MATA work together to bridge the gap between execution and analytics so every trade makes the next one smarter.

features.title: Connected Execution
features.body: Execute across multiple asset classes through a consistent trading experience.

features.title: Cross-Asset Analytics
features.body: Understand execution quality and uncover insights across your entire portfolio.

features.title: Data-Driven Decisions
features.body: Leverage actionable analytics that help optimize future execution strategies.

whyRbc.heading: Why RBC Capital Markets
whyRbc.body: They power the innovation, capabilities, and culture that have ranked us among the world's top financial institutions.

stats.label: Asset coverage
stats.body: 700+ trading and risk specialists across 4 continents

stats.label: Balance sheet strength
stats.body: In RBC balance-sheet capacity behind every trade.

stats.label: Innovation leadership
stats.body: Award-winning trading powered by THOR and Aiden®.

stats.label: Client partnership
stats.body: Trusted relationships built on stability and expertise.

assets.title: FX
assets.body: Unified trading with cross asset visibility.

assets.title: Index strategies
assets.body: Integrated analytics for event driven execution.

featured.title: Connected execution for an increasingly fragmented market
featured.body: Institutional markets continue to evolve as liquidity becomes more distributed across venues, asset classes, and geographies. Managing this complexity requires more than access — it requires connectivity.

demoCta.body: Discover how MAAS and MATA help institutional trading desks simplify multi asset workflows, uncover deeper execution insights, and make more informed trading decisions.

newsletter.heading: Stay informed
newsletter.body: Get the latest updates and insights from RBC Capital Markets delivered to your inbox.
newsletter.consent: Yes, you may use the information I provide on this form to send me future insights from RBC Capital Markets.
